title: Raccoon Removal in Pelham Gardens, Bronx | $900–$4,000 | Best Pest Control NYC
metaDescription: Professional raccoon removal in Pelham Gardens, Bronx. Licensed wildlife control experts. Safe, humane removal from attics, chimneys & crawl spaces. Call today for fast service!
intro: Pelham Gardens homeowners know that raccoons can cause serious damage to attics, chimneys, and roof structures in this quiet residential neighborhood. Best Pest Control NYC provides expert raccoon removal services throughout Pelham Gardens, protecting your family-friendly community from wildlife intrusions. Our licensed technicians offer humane, effective solutions tailored to the unique architecture of Pelham Gardens homes.
whyUs: With over a decade serving the Bronx, Best Pest Control NYC understands the specific raccoon challenges facing Pelham Gardens residents, from wooded areas near the Hutchinson River Parkway to the tree-lined streets surrounding Pelham Parkway. Our team provides 24/7 emergency response, humane trapping, complete exclusion services, and guaranteed results to keep your Pelham Gardens home raccoon-free.
localContext: Pelham Gardens' abundance of mature trees and proximity to green spaces makes it particularly attractive to raccoons seeking shelter in attics and chimneys. The neighborhood's mix of single-family Tudor and Colonial-style homes, many built in the 1920s and 1930s, often feature architectural elements like dormer windows and roof valleys that raccoons exploit for entry.

faqs.question: How much does raccoon removal cost in Pelham Gardens?
faqs.answer: Raccoon removal in Pelham Gardens typically costs between $900 and $4,000, depending on the severity of the infestation, number of raccoons, entry points, and necessary repairs. A single raccoon extraction averages $900–$1,500, while a mother with babies or extensive attic damage can cost $2,500–$4,000. We provide free inspections and detailed estimates before beginning work.

faqs.question: Are raccoons common in Pelham Gardens?
faqs.answer: Yes, raccoons are quite common in Pelham Gardens due to the neighborhood's tree-lined streets, proximity to Pelham Bay Park, and abundance of older homes with accessible attics and chimneys. The residential character with plenty of vegetation and occasional unsecured garbage provides ideal habitat and food sources, making professional removal services frequently needed.

faqs.question: How quickly can you remove raccoons from my Pelham Gardens home?
faqs.answer: We offer same-day and next-day service throughout Pelham Gardens for raccoon emergencies. The removal process typically takes 3–7 days depending on the situation. Initial trapping and removal happens within 24–48 hours, followed by exclusion work to seal entry points and prevent re-entry. We also offer 24/7 emergency response for urgent situations involving aggressive raccoons or those in living spaces.

faqs.question: What damage can raccoons cause to Pelham Gardens homes?
faqs.answer: Raccoons can cause extensive damage to Pelham Gardens homes, including torn insulation, chewed electrical wiring (fire hazard), damaged roof vents and soffits, contaminated attics with feces and urine, destroyed ductwork, and compromised structural wood. They often enlarge existing openings in older homes and can cause thousands of dollars in damage if not removed promptly. Our service includes damage assessment and repair recommendations.
